block_00: Weekly trading updates from IQ Option
block_01: The US economy exceeded expectations by adding a staggering 253,000 jobs last month, surpassing the projected 180,000 jobs anticipated by economists. Additionally, the unemployment rate has reached an unprecedented low of 3.4% — a level not seen since 1969.
block_02: In other news, Kenvue, the consumer health business spun out of
block_04: , debuted its initial public offering at $22 per share on Wednesday night. With prominent brands like Tylenol, Band-Aid, and Listerine under its umbrella, Kenvue's IPO generates significant interest among investors.
